CONTENT.See also: List of Jewish footballersList of Jews in sportsList of Israelis
CONTENT.Early life: Almog was born and raised in Ness Ziona, Israel, to a Jewish family.
CONTENT.Club career: Almog started his senior career with Israeli Premier League club Maccabi Tel Aviv. After that, he played for Israeli side Beitar Tel Aviv Bat Yam. In 2019, he signed for Hapoel Hadera in the Israeli Premier League, where he made nineteen appearances and scored four goals.
CONTENT.External links: Eylon Almog – Israel Football Association league player detailsEylon Almog – Israel Football Association national team player detailsEylon Almog at SoccerwayElon Almog: "I don't want to win a stellar championship"

SUMMARY: Eylon Haim Almog (or Eilon, Hebrew: אילון אלמוג; born (1999-01-08)8 January 1999) is an Israeli professional footballer who plays as a forward for Israeli Premier League club Hapoel Be'er Sheva.
